cases.title: Testing-plan close-time absent finalization row: unresolved enrolled students become Absent
preconditions: Testing-plan §3.1 Close-time absent finalization block applies (FR-09, BR-13, AC-12).
Open class session exists with multiple actively enrolled students.
At least one enrolled student has successful Present or Late attendance.
At least one enrolled student has no successful attendance record (Pending).
steps: Record roster beforeState: per-student attendance statuses and pending count.
Execute session close processing via POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/close service boundary.
Query AttendanceRecord rows for all enrolled students in the session.
Compare unresolved students against those with prior Present or Late success.
cases.expected: Scenario-matrix maps to testing-plan Close-time absent finalization row: enrolled students without successful attendance are assigned Absent per BR-13; students with existing Present or Late retain their status.

cases.title: M03 close event triggers M05 Attendance Ledger absent finalizer within DB transaction
preconditions: Integration harness uses real DB transaction boundaries for class_sessions and attendance_records tables.
Open session exists with three enrolled students: one Present via QR check-in, two Pending with no success record.
M03 Session Lifecycle and M05 Attendance Ledger modules are wired per module breakdown §3.3 and §3.5.
steps: Capture beforeState: session Open; two students Pending, one Present in attendance_records.
Invoke M03 closeSession(sessionId, actor) which emits session-close absent-finalization event to M05.
Query attendance_records table for all enrolled students within the same transaction boundary.
Verify session row state Closed with closedAt persisted.
Confirm prior CheckInAttempt rows for Pending students are not deleted.
cases.expected: M03→M05 module boundary commits Closed session and creates Absent AttendanceRecord rows for both Pending students; Present student remains Present; rejected attempt history is preserved.

cases.title: SM-03 AttendanceRecord transitions Pending to Absent when SM-01 session becomes Closed
preconditions: Open class session exists in integration test database.
Enrolled student has AttendanceRecord in Pending state with no successful check-in.
Session SM-01 state is Open.
steps: Capture beforeState: AttendanceRecord status Pending for student-session pair; session state Open.
Execute close transition on SM-01 ClassSession (Open to Closed).
Capture afterState: AttendanceRecord status and session state.
Verify no illegal intermediate states are committed to persistence.
cases.expected: beforeState Pending transitions to afterState Absent when session beforeState Open becomes afterState Closed; transition occurs only for students without successful attendance per BR-13 guard.

cases.title: POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/close returns 200 with absent summary reflecting FR-09 finalization
preconditions: Assigned Lecturer is authenticated with bearer token and Idempotency-Key header.
Open session exists with enrolled students: two checked in (Present/Late), three without success.
Session was opened via POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/open.
steps: Lecturer calls POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/close with Authorization header.
Inspect HTTP status 200 and standard {data, meta, error} envelope with error null.
Assert data.state is Closed, data.closedAt is non-null ISO-8601 UTC, and data.summary.absent equals count of students without prior success.
Assert data.summary also includes present, late, and manualPresent integer counts per API design §4.3.
cases.expected: Close returns HTTP 200 with data.state Closed and data.summary.absent matching FR-09 auto-absent count; envelope meta includes requestId and timestamp.

cases.title: GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance roster shows Absent rows after close finalization
preconditions: Assigned Lecturer is authenticated.
Open session with five enrolled students: two Present/Late via QR, three Pending without success.
Session has not yet been closed.
steps: Call POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/close and capture closedAt and summary.absent from response.
Call GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance with Lecturer Authorization.
Validate HTTP 200 and envelope shape per API design §4.5.
Assert data.state is Closed, data.counts.absent reflects finalized count, and rows array entries for unresolved students show attendanceStatus Absent.
Verify Present/Late rows retain checkInMethod and checkInAt fields unchanged.
cases.expected: Attendance roster endpoint returns HTTP 200 with data.state Closed and rows showing attendanceStatus Absent for FR-09-finalized students; live roster payload shape matches FR-19 contract with updated counts.

cases.title: E2E-07 primary workflow: session close finalizes unresolved enrolled students as Absent
preconditions: Lecturer opens Scheduled session via POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/open.
Section has five enrolled students; two complete successful QR check-in (Present/Late).
Three students never achieve successful check-in while session is Open.
Lecturer is assigned to the session class section.
steps: Lecturer opens session and confirms Open state.
Two students call POST /v1/check-ins with valid qrToken and receive Success outcomes.
Lecturer calls POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/close.
Lecturer queries GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance for full roster.
Verify each of the three unresolved students has attendanceStatus Absent with no checkInAt.
cases.expected: WF-06 close-time outcome per §8.3: three unresolved enrolled students receive Absent; two checked-in students retain Present/Late; FR-09 system finalization completes as part of close workflow.

cases.title: Alternate branch preserves Excused and Manual Present students during absent finalization
preconditions: Open session exists with four enrolled students all without QR success.
Lecturer pre-applies manual corrections within edit window: one student to Excused, one to Manual Present with required reason.
Two students remain Pending with no manual resolution.
steps: Verify pre-close roster shows Excused and Manual Present for corrected students.
Lecturer calls POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/close.
Query GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance for all four students.
Inspect audit records for manual corrections remain intact.
cases.expected: FR-09 exception rule: Excused and Manual Present students are not overwritten to Absent; two unresolved Pending students become Absent; manual correction audit trail is preserved.

cases.title: System auto-close per policy triggers FR-09 absent finalization for unresolved students
preconditions: Open session exists with effective policy defining auto-close after late window end.
Multiple enrolled students: one Present, two Pending without success.
Test harness can advance clock or trigger scheduler evaluation past late window.
Lecturer has not manually closed the session.
steps: Open session and record openedAt and policy late window end timestamp.
Advance time past late window end or invoke auto-close scheduler job.
Query session state and assert Closed with closedAt set.
Query GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance for Pending students.
Verify Present student status unchanged and two Pending students now Absent.
cases.expected: Alternate branch per BR-21: system actor transitions Open to Closed and applies BR-13 absent finalization identically to manual close; FR-09 runs on policy auto-close trigger.

cases.title: Close finalization does not downgrade Present or Late success records to Absent
preconditions: Open session with enrolled students holding Present, Late, and Pending statuses.
Present and Late were assigned via successful POST /v1/check-ins.
One student remains Pending with only failed check-in attempts logged (no success).
steps: Record attendance statuses and checkInAt before close for Present, Late, and Pending students.
Lecturer calls POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/close.
Query attendance records and verify status immutability for success paths.
Confirm Pending-only student receives Absent and failed attempts are retained.
cases.expected: FR-09 boundary: Present and Late records remain unchanged after close; only the Pending student without success is assigned Absent; failed attempt history for the absent student is not deleted.

cases.title: Idempotent close applies BR-13 absent finalization exactly once per student
preconditions: Open session with enrolled student in Pending state and no success record.
Idempotency-Key header support is enabled for POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/close.
Real database with unique constraint on (classSessionId, studentUserId) attendance records.
steps: Issue two parallel or sequential POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/close requests with the same Idempotency-Key.
Query AttendanceRecord count and status for the Pending student.
Verify audit and close summary counts are not duplicated.
Confirm INV-06 idempotent finalization per state machine doc.
cases.expected: Student receives exactly one Absent AttendanceRecord; repeated close calls return current Closed state without duplicate absent rows or inflated summary.absent count.

cases.title: Unauthorized close attempts do not trigger FR-09 absent finalization
preconditions: Open session exists in lecturer-assigned section with Pending enrolled students.
Student and SystemAuditor users are authenticated.
Assigned Lecturer bearer token is available as authorized control.
steps: Student calls POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/close.
SystemAuditor calls POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/close.
Query session state and attendance records after denied attempts.
Assigned Lecturer calls the same endpoint as control and verify absent finalization occurs.
cases.expected: Student and SystemAuditor receive 403 Forbidden or OutOfScope; session remains Open and no Absent finalization occurs from denied calls; assigned Lecturer control succeeds and triggers FR-09 absent assignment.

cases.title: Lecturer PG-05 close journey updates roster with Absent badges for unresolved students
preconditions: Lecturer is authenticated on desktop Chromium (PG-05 session control page).
Open session displays live roster with mix of Present/Late and Pending students.
ConfirmActionModal copy warns about auto-absent on close per FLOW-07.
steps: Navigate to lecturer session detail page and verify Open status badge and active QR panel.
Tap Close attendance and confirm action in ConfirmActionModal warning about auto-absent.
Observe session status badge changes to Closed and QR panel is hidden.
Review PG-06 roster: Pending students show Absent danger badge; Present/Late rows unchanged.
Verify summary chips reflect updated present, late, and absent counts matching close API summary.
cases.expected: Browser flow reflects FR-09 outcome: unresolved enrolled students display Absent AttendanceStatusCell with danger variant; Excused/Manual Present rows if present are not overwritten; roster summary matches API close summary.
